title: Incident Record
description: A structured record of a compliance incident: a failure, gap, or breach in the platform's compliance state. Required for any incident meeting the severity threshold (high or critical). Must be created within 48 hours of resolution. Lives in 09-assessments/incidents/.

title.description: Short, factual title of the incident.

severity.description: Only high and critical incidents require formal incident records. Lower severity events are tracked as GitHub Issues.

description.description: What happened and how the incident was discovered.

affected_control_ids.description: Control IDs that were violated or exposed as inadequate by this incident.

resolved_at.description: When the incident was resolved. Absent if status is open or monitoring.

root_cause.description: Factual root cause analysis. What caused this? Not who caused it.

remediation.description: What was done to resolve the incident.

recurrence_prevention.description: What changes will prevent this incident from recurring.

lessons_learned_adr_id.description: ADR generated from lessons learned, if any.

lessons_learned_change_ids.description: Change records created as a direct result of this incident.

status.description: open: incident is active. resolved: fully resolved. monitoring: resolved but under observation.
